title: README and AGENTS live staged extract live LLM operator docs
problem: ticket-204 adds --live-staged-fallthrough and RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_STAGED_EXTRACT_LIVE_LLM but operator docs still describe mock-only staged extract after ingest.
acceptance_criteria: README Operator Quickstart documents live staged extract env gates and pytest command.
AGENTS.md references per-step live staged extract opt-in without implying orchestrator live LLM.
Golden pass and safety audit pass.
